source_quote: Agriculture is the lifeline of Pakistan’s economy accounting for 19.5 percent of the gross domestic product, employing 42.3 percent

effect: rising demand for high-value perishable products

source_quote: achieved growth of 3.46 percent against the target of 3.5 percent and last year’s meager growth of 0.27 percent

claim: The summit theme, Connectivity for Regional Prosperity, aligned with the Government of Pakistan's priorities of improving internal and external connectivity.

effect: Achievement of sustainable and inclusive development, equitable growth, stability and prosperity

claim: The Declaration acknowledged Afghanistan's importance for the ECO region and reiterated support for reconstruction, sustainable development, peace, and security in Afghanistan.
indicator_or_subject: Afghanistan reconstruction, development, peace and security
effect: Support to national, regional and global efforts for reconstruction, sustainable development, peace and security in Afghanistan

source_quote: welcomed the recently adopted United Nations General Assembly Resolution on proclaiming International Decade for Action “Water for Sustainable Development” (2018-2028).
claim: The Declaration welcomed the UN General Assembly resolution proclaiming the International Decade for Action, Water for Sustainable Development, for 2018-2028.
policy_or_programme: International Decade for Action Water for Sustainable Development (2018-2028)
policy_or_programmes: International Decade for Action Water for Sustainable Development (2018-2028)

source_quote: Member States as well as ECO Secretariat, ECO Specialized Agencies and Regional Institutions will take necessary steps
claim: The Declaration welcomed ECO Vision 2025 and resolved that member states, the ECO Secretariat, specialized agencies, and regional institutions would take necessary steps for timely and effective implementation.
effect: Timely and effective implementation of ECO Vision 2025

source_quote: allowed identifying new areas of cooperation while cementing the progress on matters currently under process.
claim: The Summit gave ECO members an opportunity to reaffirm collective commitment to regional progress and prosperity, identify new cooperation areas, and consolidate ongoing work.
cause: Summit deliberations and decisions on cooperation areas
effect: Reaffirmed collective commitment, identification of new areas of cooperation, and cementing progress on ongoing matters

source_quote: the two sides work together to implement the China Pakistan Economic Corridor (CPEC)

effect: Pakistan-China ties are reaching new heights

indicator_or_subject: regional connectivity under CPEC and OBOR
effect: bring the region together through enhanced connectivity

source_quote: With initiation in 2013, CPEC has expanded to encompass cooperation in a large number of sectors

effect: expanded to encompass cooperation in a large number of sectors

source_quote: allowing regional countries access to warm waters through shortest land routes
claim: Pakistan’s geostrategic location is expected to let regional countries access warm waters through the shortest land routes, extending CPEC benefits beyond Pakistan and China.
cause: Pakistan’s geostrategic location
effect: regional countries access to warm waters through shortest land routes

source_quote: ‘Early Harvest’ projects with completion by 2018, Short and Medium Term projects
claim: CPEC projects are organized into Early Harvest, short-term, medium-term and long-term planning categories with target completion horizons through 2018, 2020 and 2025.

comparison.comparator: short and medium term projects by 2020 and 2025

source_quote: energy sector, infrastructure development in the area of rail and road network, development of Gwadar
claim: CPEC cooperation covers energy, rail and road infrastructure, Gwadar development, industrial parks and optical fiber IT connectivity.

source_quote: Pakistan expects to overcome its energy shortage by 2018
claim: Pakistan expects to overcome its energy shortage by 2018, with the Government focused on alleviating shortages.
constraint_or_risk: energy shortage
effect: overcome its energy shortage by 2018

source_quote: providing uninterrupted energy supply to the industrial sector
claim: The Government has been providing uninterrupted energy supply to the industrial sector to maintain economic momentum.
constraint_or_risk: energy shortages
effect: maintain economic momentum of the country

source_quote: financial outlay of US$ 34.74 billion for the energy sector projects
claim: Under CPEC, Pakistan and China agreed to a US$34.74 billion financial outlay for energy sector projects.

source_quote: A total of 17,045 MW will be added to the system with 10,000 MW expected in 2018
claim: CPEC energy projects are expected to add 17,045 MW to the system, including 10,000 MW expected in 2018.

effect: 17,045 MW will be added to the system

source_quote: great impetus to the economic and business activity in the country

effect: significant relief is expected to be passed on to domestic as well as commercial consumers

source_quote: The following 12 projects with a total cost of US$ 15,377 million are under implementation through IPP mode

cause: Infrastructure
effect: connecting regions, supporting industrialization, easier and faster access to markets and improved competitiveness
